style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura pulses gently around Blastois, casting elongated, bending shadows that twist unnaturally across the ground. Slow drifting mist particles swirl in the air, glowing faintly with ghostly blue-white luminescence, while distorted reflections ripple in the still water beneath it. Cold eerie purple light emanates from its body, casting deep, shifting shadows in the dimly lit environment. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
